title: cleidion lochmios
intro: Cleidion lochmios, also known as the "twisted-stalk," is a type of plant native to tropical regions. It is a climbing vine with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Cleidion lochmios can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
